  1. Description

Interface CqlSpecification

All Known Implementing Classes:
AlterKeyspaceSpecification, AlterTableSpecification, AlterUserTypeSpecification, CreateIndexSpecification, CreateKeyspaceSpecification, CreateTableSpecification, CreateUserTypeSpecification, DropIndexSpecification, DropKeyspaceSpecification, DropTableSpecification, DropUserTypeSpecification
public interface CqlSpecification
Marker interface for CQL specification objects that describe CQL keyspace objects.
Since:
4.4
